executives.name: Rob Carpenter
executives.background: Dr. Carpenter is a Professional Geoscientist (P.Geo) with over 30 years of experience in the mineral exploration industry. He was the co-founder and President and CEO of Kaminak Gold Corp. where he led the team to the multi-million ounce Coffee Gold discovery in the Yukon. He has a Ph.D. from Western University.

executives.name: Alex Heath
executives.background: Mr. Heath has over 15 years of experience in the financial services and mining industries. He previously served as President and CEO of Ethos Gold Corp. (now Prospector Metals). He has also worked in investment banking with a focus on the mining sector.

executives.name: Danielle MacDonald
executives.background: Ms. MacDonald is a CPA, CA with over 15 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate compliance for public companies in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Rob Carpenter
board_of_directors.background: Professional Geoscientist with over 30 years of experience, former CEO of Kaminak Gold Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Alex Heath
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Prospector Metals Corp. and investment banking professional.

board_of_directors.name: Jo Price
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Price is a Professional Geoscientist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles in exploration and corporate development.

board_of_directors.name: James Rogers
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Rogers is a resource professional with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in project generation and exploration.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Directors Page
News Release: Appointment of Dr. Rob Carpenter as CEO
